name: @bindtty/e2e
description: End-to-end tests for the BindTTY package graph.

scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @bindtty/runtime && npm run build --workspace @bindtty/layout && npm run build --workspace @bindtty/renderer-terminal && npm run build --workspace @bindtty/jsx-runtime && npm run build --workspace @bindtty/terminal && npm run build --workspace bindtty && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node --test dist/*.test.js
